component.description: 60-V, 800-mA Industrial eFuse With Integrated Input and Output Reverse Polarity Protection

electrical_characteristics.conditions: 0.025 A ≤ I(OUT) ≤ 0.8 A, TJ = 85°C, R(ILIM) = 7.5 kΩ

electrical_characteristics.parameter: OUT leakage current under output reverse polarity condition
electrical_characteristics.raw_name: OUT leakage current under output reverse polarity condition
electrical_characteristics.conditions: V(IN) = 24 V, V(OUT) = – 24 V, V(SHDN) = 2 V

pin_definitions.description: Resistor programmable undervoltage lockout threshold setting input.
Shutdown pin. Pulling the pin low makes the device to enter into low power shutdown mode.
Reference ground for all internal voltages
A resistor from this pin to RTN sets the overload and short-circuit current limit.
A capacitor from this pin to RTN sets output voltage slew rate.
Fault event indicator. This pin is an open drain output.
Connect PowerPAD to RTN plane for heat sinking. Do not use PowerPAD as the only electrical connection to RTN.

logical_pins.name: UVLO
logical_pins.description: Resistor programmable undervoltage lockout threshold setting input. Connect to IN via 1-MΩ resistor if unused.

logical_pins.name: OVP
logical_pins.description: Resistor programmable overvoltage protection threshold. Connect to RTN if unused.

logical_pins.name: SHDN
logical_pins.description: Shutdown pin. Active low. Pulling low enters low power shutdown mode.

logical_pins.name: RTN
logical_pins.description: Reference ground for all internal voltages

logical_pins.name: ILIM
logical_pins.description: A resistor from this pin to RTN sets the overload and short-circuit current limit

logical_pins.name: dVdT
logical_pins.description: A capacitor from this pin to RTN sets output voltage slew rate

logical_pins.name: FLT
logical_pins.description: Fault event indicator. Open drain output.

logical_pins.name: PowerPAD
logical_pins.description: Exposed pad for heat sinking. Connect to RTN plane.

2.name: UVLO
2.description: Resistor programmable undervoltage lockout threshold setting input. Connect to IN via 1-MΩ resistor if unused.

3.name: OVP
3.description: Resistor programmable overvoltage protection threshold. Connect to RTN if unused.

4.name: SHDN
4.description: Shutdown pin. Active low. Pulling low enters low power shutdown mode.

5.name: RTN
5.description: Reference ground for all internal voltages

7.name: ILIM
7.description: A resistor from this pin to RTN sets the overload and short-circuit current limit

8.name: dVdT
8.description: A capacitor from this pin to RTN sets output voltage slew rate

9.name: FLT
9.description: Fault event indicator. Open drain output.

EP.name: PowerPAD
EP.description: Exposed pad for heat sinking. Connect to RTN plane.
